title: MaterialReplicationModern
description: Simple addon that adds Matter System to GTCEuM
body: Material Replication is a simple addon to GTCEuM   that adds matter system like GregTech5. The latest version of this mod adds new 3 machines and new 4 materials. **New Machines** * Deconstructor Deconstructor decomposes the corresponding material into a new MATERIAL, Positive Matter and Neutral Matter. Duration and the amount of each matter obtained depends on the material. A slight chance of obtaining Primal Matter during deconstruction. * Replicator Replicator replicates pure MATERIAL from the Positive Matter and Neutral Matter. For duplication, the special USB with the data of the target material written on it is required. * Annihilator Annihilator erases __all but the energy brought in__. Upon elimination, there is a small chance of obtaining Scrap, and a material, Matter Amplifier is obtained from Scrap. Matter Amplifier is a special material that can replicate two types of matter.
